CREATE TABLE users (uuid UUID, name String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO users VALUES (generateUUIDv4(), 'Alice');
INSERT INTO users (name) VALUES ('Bob');
SELECT * FROM users;
CREATE TABLE orders (uuid UUID, user_uuid UUID, amount Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (generateUUIDv4(), (SELECT uuid FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice'), 100.50);
INSERT INTO orders (user_uuid, amount) VALUES ((SELECT uuid FROM users WHERE name = 'Bob'), 150.75);
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.uuid = o.user_uuid;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (uuid UUID, description String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO temp_data SELECT generateUUIDv4(), 'Sample Record ' || number FROM numbers(5);
SELECT * FROM temp_data ORDER BY uuid;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_data WHERE uuid = (SELECT uuid FROM temp_data LIMIT 1);
CREATE TABLE new_records (uuid UUID, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY uuid;
INSERT INTO new_records SELECT generateUUIDv4(), 'Record ' || number FROM numbers(50);
SELECT * FROM new_records WHERE uuid IN (SELECT uuid FROM new_records WHERE data LIKE 'Record 2%');
CREATE TABLE aggregated_data (uuid UUID, value Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO aggregated_data VALUES (generateUUIDv4(), 10), (generateUUIDv4(), 20), (generateUUIDv4(), 30);
SELECT uuid, max(value) FROM aggregated_data GROUP BY uuid;
CREATE TABLE sorted_data (uuid UUID, score Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO sorted_data SELECT generateUUIDv4(), number FROM numbers(100);
SELECT uuid, score FROM sorted_data ORDER BY toUInt128(uuid);
CREATE TABLE final_data AS aggregated_data WITH NO DATA;
INSERT INTO final_data SELECT generateUUIDv4(), SUM(value) FROM aggregated_data GROUP BY uuid;
